requirements.jd_requirement: Implement, maintain, and tune Microsoft Purview Information Protection/DLP policies
requirements.matched_skills: Secure implementation practices, Deployable security controls
requirements.evidence: Built and operated production-grade security systems with focus on deployable controls and measurable risk reduction; experienced in secure cloud operations across Azure.

requirements.jd_requirement: Develop and tune DLP rules for endpoints to manage data flow between approved boundaries
requirements.matched_skills: Windows fleet operations, Endpoint agent update orchestration, BitLocker enforcement automation
requirements.evidence: Operated large-scale Windows and macOS fleets with automated patching, encryption enforcement, and endpoint remediation workflows.

requirements.jd_requirement: Manage sensitivity labels, mandatory encryption, and content marking across M365
requirements.matched_skills: IAM implementation, Secrets management, Secure cloud operations
requirements.evidence: Designed and implemented IAM workflows across Azure/AWS environments; experienced in secure cloud operations with strong focus on secrets management and access control.

requirements.jd_requirement: Collaborate with IT and department teams to align DLP policy coverage with compliance frameworks (NIST 800-171, CMMC, etc.)
requirements.evidence: Translated complex compliance requirements into operational controls and documented them in runbooks; coordinated across security, IAM, and infrastructure teams.

requirements.jd_requirement: Investigate DLP incidents using Defender XDR and Sentinel; correlate events and generate insights
requirements.matched_skills: Log analysis, Anomaly-oriented analysis, Security metrics and reporting
requirements.evidence: Built security analytics pipelines using Pandas/NumPy for log correlation and anomaly detection; developed dashboards to track incident trends and policy effectiveness.

requirements.jd_requirement: Maintain DLP dashboards and reporting; support audits and risk assessments
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Data normalization, Asset reconciliation
requirements.evidence: Engineered data pipelines for multi-source security telemetry ingestion and normalization; resolved inventory drift and reconciled asset records across systems.

requirements.jd_requirement: Serve as technical liaison for Purview, Zscaler, Qualys integrations
requirements.matched_skills: Microsoft Graph API automation, System-to-system workflow automation
requirements.evidence: Built automated workflows using Microsoft Graph API and multi-platform integrations; designed system-to-system security orchestration for SOAR/ticketing tools.

requirements.jd_requirement: Document DLP processes, SOPs, and configuration baselines in Jira/Confluence
requirements.evidence: Prioritized documentation-first approach; created runbooks and operational baselines for security controls deployed across enterprise environments.

requirements.jd_requirement: Provide technical guidance and training on data handling best practices
requirements.evidence: Worked across engineering and non-technical teams to deliver security guidance, translate requirements into controls, and train users on secure practices.

tone_notes: Emphasize operational reliability, automation pragmatism, and mission-driven impact—align with Agile Defense’s 6Hs (especially Helpful, Honest, Hungry, Hustle). Avoid overly academic or theoretical language; focus on shipped solutions, real-world constraints, and cross-team enablement.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a security engineer who builds and operates production-grade DLP systems—not just policy designers, but operators who ship automation, documentation, and measurable risk reduction across cloud and endpoint environments.
